---
title: "CLI reference"
description: "Common DraftStack CLI commands."
---

<!-- Generated by DraftStack. Edit the blueprint or regenerate the site to change this file. -->

## Authentication

`draftstack auth login`: Opens a browser login flow and stores a local CLI token.

`draftstack auth status`: Shows the active API URL and login state.

## GitHub setup

`draftstack setup github --print-url`: Prints the GitHub App installation URL without opening a browser.

`draftstack repos list --output json`: Lists repositories the installed GitHub App can access.

## Projects

`draftstack sites create --repo draftstack-docs --source-repo pat-baseten/draftstack --force`: Creates or updates the generated docs site and registers the project.

`draftstack projects api-key set <project-id> --env BASETEN_API_KEY`: Stores the model API key for a project.

`draftstack projects backfill <project-id> --days 7 --output json`: Queues recent merged pull requests for analysis.

## Suggestions

`draftstack suggestions list --project <project-id> --output json`: Lists suggestions for review.

`draftstack suggestions approve <suggestion-id> --output json`: Creates a draft GitHub pull request from an approved suggestion.
